---
title: "Experience"
page-layout: article
---

## Work Experience

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🏢 HR Business Partner Intern – An Post
**January 2025 – August 2025** · Dublin, Ireland

- Developed Excel dashboards that contributed to a **4% reduction in absence rates** over six months
- Prepared monthly reports and presentation decks for retail management highlighting key absenteeism trends
- Conducted 20+ meetings with managers across Group Technology Solutions to standardise on-call frameworks
- Helped design a structured exit interview process covering tenure, onboarding, and team culture
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🚗 Fleet Assistant (Operations) – Budds' Chevrolet
**January 2024 – August 2024** · Oakville, Ontario, Canada

- Built a digital documentation system in Excel for off-site storage, improving vehicle access efficiency
- Maintained **100% accuracy** in data entry and filing, enabling smooth audits
- Streamlined inventory tracking and eliminated discrepancies across vehicle records
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🏊 Shop Clerk – Pressure Clean Pools
**April 2022 – October 2023** · Oakville, Ontario, Canada

- Delivered customer service resulting in measurable repeat bookings
- Processed invoices and payments using QuickBooks with full accuracy and data security
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 🛒 Customer Service Representative – Canadian Tire
**May 2020 – March 2022** · Oakville, Ontario, Canada

- Resolved escalated customer concerns, resulting in positive feedback survey results
- Co-ordinated cash handling and customer service training for new staff
:::

---

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Years | Result |
|--------|------------|-------|--------|
| Honours BBA | Brock University, Canada | 2021–2026 | 1.1 |
| BA Global Business Studies | Dublin City University, Ireland | 2021–2026 | 1.1 |

> Dual degree completed across two continents – internship placements in both Canada and Ireland.

---

## Awards & Achievements

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
### 🏆 Honours & Recognition

- **Beta Gamma Sigma** – Top 10% of students in AACSB-accredited business programmes *(June 2024)*
- **Golden Key International Honour Society** – Top 15% of students by invitation *(September 2023)*
- **Dean's Honour List** – Year Two *(May 2023)*
- **Dean's Honour List** – Year One *(May 2022)*
- **Brock Scholars Entry Award** – $16,000 over 4 years based on maintaining an 80% average *(September 2021)*
- **Ontario Scholars Award** – 80%+ academic average *(June 2021)*
:::

---

## Voluntary Work

::: {.callout-caution icon=false}
### 🤝 Community Involvement

**Global Aid Club** · St. Ignatius of Loyola Catholic Secondary School, Oakville  
Developed and executed fundraising events and donation collections for local and international charities.

**Kerr Street Mission** · Oakville, Ontario  
Raised awareness and promoted local food drives through community outreach efforts.
:::

---

## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| Data & Analytics | Python, Pandas, Excel (Advanced), Power BI |
| Development | Quarto, Git, GitHub Pages, SCSS |
| Machine Learning | Scikit-learn, classification models, model evaluation |
| Visualisation | Plotly, Matplotlib |
| Business Software | Microsoft Office Suite, QuickBooks |

---

## Athletics & Interests

::: {.callout-important icon=false}
### ⚡ Beyond the Desk

- **Competitive Trampoline** – Six years as a competitive athlete, multiple medal winner
- **Snowboard Racing & American Football** – Competed during secondary school
- **Photography & Travel** – Passionate about documenting places and cultures through a lens
- **Reading** – Staying current with global news and a wide range of genres
:::
